# This is the CMakeCache file.
# For build in directory: /Users/xuning/Work/go-dem/build3/hdf5_build
# It was generated by CMake: /opt/homebrew/bin/cmake
# You can edit this file to change values found and used by cmake.
# If you do not want to change any of the values, simply exit the editor.
# If you do want to change a value, simply edit, save, and exit the editor.
# The syntax for the file is as follows:
# KEY:TYPE=VALUE
# KEY is the name of a variable in the cache.
# TYPE is a hint to GUIs for the type of VALUE, DO NOT EDIT TYPE!.
# VALUE is the current value for the KEY.

########################
# EXTERNAL cache entries
########################

//Name of SZ filter package
SZ_PACKAGE_NAME:STRING=SZ

//Use SZ filter from compressed file
SZ_TGZ_NAME:STRING=SZ-2.1.12.5.tar.gz

//Use PLUGINS from original location
SZ_TGZ_ORIGPATH:STRING=https://github.com/szcompressor/SZ/releases/download/v2.1.12.5

ZFP_GIT_BRANCH:STRING=develop

//Use ZFP from  GitHub repository
ZFP_GIT_URL:STRING=https://github.com/LLNL/zfp.git

//Name of ZFP package
ZFP_PACKAGE_NAME:STRING=zfp

//Use ZFP from compressed file
ZFP_TGZ_NAME:STRING=zfp-1.0.1.tar.gz

//Use PLUGINS from original location
ZFP_TGZ_ORIGPATH:STRING=https://github.com/LLNL/zfp/releases/download/1.0.0

//GIT tag to retrieve external zlib-ng source from
ZLIBNG_GIT_TAG:STRING=2.3.3

//GIT URL to retrieve external zlib-ng source from
ZLIBNG_GIT_URL:STRING=https://github.com/zlib-ng/zlib-ng.git

//Name of zlib-ng package
ZLIBNG_PACKAGE_NAME:STRING=ZLIBNG

//Base name of zlib-ng compressed file
ZLIBNG_TGZ_NAME:STRING=2.3.3.tar.gz

//URL to retrieve external zlib-ng compressed file from
ZLIBNG_TGZ_ORIGPATH:STRING=https://github.com/zlib-ng/zlib-ng/archive/refs/tags

//GIT tag to retrieve external zlib source from
ZLIB_GIT_TAG:STRING=v1.3.2

//GIT URL to retrieve external zlib source from
ZLIB_GIT_URL:STRING=https://github.com/madler/zlib.git

//Name of ZLIB package
ZLIB_PACKAGE_NAME:STRING=zlib

//Base name of zlib compressed file
ZLIB_TGZ_NAME:STRING=zlib-1.3.2.tar.gz

//URL to retrieve external zlib compressed file from
ZLIB_TGZ_ORIGPATH:STRING=https://github.com/madler/zlib/releases/download/v1.3.2

ZSTD_GIT_BRANCH:STRING=dev

//Use ZSTD from GitHub repository
ZSTD_GIT_URL:STRING=https://github.com/facebook/zstd.git

//Name of ZSTD package
ZSTD_PACKAGE_NAME:STRING=zstd

//Use ZSTD from compressed file
ZSTD_TGZ_NAME:STRING=zstd-1.5.7.tar.gz

//Use PLUGINS from original location
ZSTD_TGZ_ORIGPATH:STRING=https://github.com/facebook/zstd/releases/download/v1.5.7

//Fortran name mangling macro for C identifiers without underscores
H5_FC_FUNC:INTERNAL=H5_FC_FUNC(name,NAME) name ## _
//Fortran name mangling macro for C identifiers with underscores
H5_FC_FUNC_:INTERNAL=H5_FC_FUNC_(name,NAME) name ## _
//Checking if compiler can convert _Float16 type with casts

H5_HAVE___TM_GMTOFF:INTERNAL=
//Checking if correctly converting long double to _Float16 values
H5_LDOUBLE_TO_FLOAT16_CORRECT:INTERNAL=1
//Result of TRY_COMPILE
H5_LDOUBLE_TO_FLOAT16_CORRECT_COMPILE:INTERNAL=TRUE
//Checking if correctly converting long double to _Float16 values
// (without CMAKE_C_FLAGS)
H5_LDOUBLE_TO_FLOAT16_CORRECT_NO_FLAGS:INTERNAL=1
//Result of TRY_COMPILE
H5_LDOUBLE_TO_FLOAT16_CORRECT_NO_FLAGS_COMPILE:INTERNAL=TRUE
//Result of try_run()
H5_LDOUBLE_TO_FLOAT16_CORRECT_NO_FLAGS_RUN:INTERNAL=0
//Result of try_run()
H5_LDOUBLE_TO_FLOAT16_CORRECT_RUN:INTERNAL=0
//Checking IF correctly converting long double to (unsigned) long
// long values
H5_LDOUBLE_TO_LLONG_ACCURATE:INTERNAL=1
//Result of TRY_COMPILE
H5_LDOUBLE_TO_LLONG_ACCURATE_COMPILE:INTERNAL=TRUE
//Result of try_run()
H5_LDOUBLE_TO_LLONG_ACCURATE_RUN:INTERNAL=0
//Checking IF your system converts long double to (unsigned) long
// values with special algorithm
H5_LDOUBLE_TO_LONG_SPECIAL:INTERNAL=
//Result of TRY_COMPILE
H5_LDOUBLE_TO_LONG_SPECIAL_COMPILE:INTERNAL=TRUE
//Result of try_run()
H5_LDOUBLE_TO_LONG_SPECIAL_RUN:INTERNAL=1
//Checking IF correctly converting (unsigned) long long to long
// double values
H5_LLONG_TO_LDOUBLE_CORRECT:INTERNAL=1
//Result of TRY_COMPILE
H5_LLONG_TO_LDOUBLE_CORRECT_COMPILE:INTERNAL=TRUE
//Result of try_run()
H5_LLONG_TO_LDOUBLE_CORRECT_RUN:INTERNAL=0
//Checking IF your system can convert (unsigned) long to long double

//Result of try_run()

//CHECK_TYPE_SIZE: sizeof(double)

//SizeOf for double _Complex

//CHECK_TYPE_SIZE: sizeof(float)

//SizeOf for float _Complex

ZLIB_GIT_URL-ADVANCED:INTERNAL=1
//ADVANCED property for variable: ZLIB_PACKAGE_NAME
ZLIB_PACKAGE_NAME-ADVANCED:INTERNAL=1
//ADVANCED property for variable: ZLIB_TGZ_NAME
ZLIB_TGZ_NAME-ADVANCED:INTERNAL=1
//ADVANCED property for variable: ZLIB_TGZ_ORIGPATH
ZLIB_TGZ_ORIGPATH-ADVANCED:INTERNAL=1
//Version of zlib to use when building from external source
ZLIB_VERSION:INTERNAL=1.3.2
//ADVANCED property for variable: ZSTD_GIT_BRANCH
ZSTD_GIT_BRANCH-ADVANCED:INTERNAL=1
//ADVANCED property for variable: ZSTD_GIT_URL
ZSTD_GIT_URL-ADVANCED:INTERNAL=1
//ADVANCED property for variable: ZSTD_PACKAGE_NAME
ZSTD_PACKAGE_NAME-ADVANCED:INTERNAL=1
//ADVANCED property for variable: ZSTD_TGZ_NAME
ZSTD_TGZ_NAME-ADVANCED:INTERNAL=1
//ADVANCED property for variable: ZSTD_TGZ_ORIGPATH
ZSTD_TGZ_ORIGPATH-ADVANCED:INTERNAL=1
//Have function qsort_r
_HAVE_QSORT_R_TMP:INTERNAL=1
//Have function qsort_s
_HAVE_QSORT_S_TMP:INTERNAL=
//Have symbol FLT16_EPSILON
h5_have_flt16_epsilon:INTERNAL=1
//Have symbol FLT16_MANT_DIG
h5_have_flt16_mant_dig:INTERNAL=1
//Have symbol FLT16_MAX
h5_have_flt16_max:INTERNAL=1
//Have symbol FLT16_MAX_10_EXP
h5_have_flt16_max_10_exp:INTERNAL=1
//Have symbol FLT16_MIN
h5_have_flt16_min:INTERNAL=1
//Have symbol FLT16_MIN_10_EXP
h5_have_flt16_min_10_exp:INTERNAL=1
